    44159: `isPendingMigration`, causing the dashboard to gracefully show the \"Data Sync Pending\" warning rather
    44160: than crashing. \n6. To resolve this, the migration must be applied to the active database. Since the
    44161: database URL in `.env.local` points to a remote Supabase instance (`netvfzmdewatfnmejcrz`), the CLI
    44162: command requires linking or pushing directly to that remote instance.\n\n## Caveats\n- The exact

    44170: --project-ref netvfzmdewatfnmejcrz\n   npx supabase db push\n   ```\n   (Alternatively, if applying to a
